tests.scenario: Save a mood entry successfully
tests.expected_result: The mood entry is saved successfully.
tests.notes: Aligned with refined hybrid requirement RH1 for mood tracking.

tests.scenario: Mood entry is not saved when check-in is abandoned
tests.expected_result: No mood entry is saved.

tests.scenario: View saved mood entries
steps: Use an account with saved entries
tests.expected_result: Previously saved mood entries are displayed.

tests.scenario: Mood history is empty when there are no prior entries
steps: Use an account with no saved entries
tests.expected_result: No saved entries are displayed.

tests.scenario: Access support content during stress
tests.expected_result: At least one support resource is displayed.
tests.notes: Derived from stress support persona PH2.

tests.scenario: Open a support resource within the app
tests.expected_result: The support content opens within the app.

tests.scenario: Display reflective question after check-in
tests.expected_result: A reflective question is displayed.
tests.notes: Ensures reflective functionality tied to RH4.

tests.scenario: No reflective question without completed check-in
steps: Start but do not complete a mood check-in
tests.expected_result: No reflective question is displayed.

tests.scenario: Display informational content
tests.expected_result: Mental health information is displayed.

tests.scenario: Informational content is readable within the app
tests.expected_result: The informational content is readable within the app interface.

tests.scenario: Show insight-based feedback
steps: Use an account with sufficient data
tests.expected_result: At least one insight or summary is displayed.
tests.notes: Ensures insights are generated from tracked data.

tests.scenario: No insight is shown when sufficient data does not exist
steps: Use an account with insufficient data
tests.expected_result: No insight or summary item is displayed.

tests.scenario: Distinguish free and premium content
tests.expected_result: Free and premium content are clearly labeled.
tests.notes: Derived from pricing concerns in PH4.

tests.scenario: Compare labels between free and premium items
steps: Navigate to a content list with mixed access types
tests.expected_result: Free content is distinguishable from premium content.

tests.scenario: Display subscription information
tests.expected_result: Subscription information is displayed before confirmation.

tests.scenario: Premium access information is available within the app
tests.expected_result: Premium access information is displayed within the app.

tests.scenario: Show privacy notice before sensitive actions
steps: Access a feature using sensitive data
tests.expected_result: Privacy information is shown before proceeding.

tests.scenario: Sensitive feature is preceded by privacy review information
steps: Open a feature using sensitive data
tests.expected_result: Privacy-related information is presented before further action.

tests.scenario: Display data handling information
tests.expected_result: Data handling information is displayed clearly.
tests.notes: Validates requirement RH10 for data transparency.

tests.scenario: Data policy information is readable within the app
steps: Navigate to the privacy or data policy section
tests.expected_result: The data handling information is readable within the app.
